content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.3.9 WARN — PaywallView.swift:11 offers a quid-pro-quo review incentive: "Leave a 5-star review and get 1 week of Premium free!" — this may trigger review questions.
Pierre: Apple explicitly prohibits incentivizing reviews or manipulating star ratings, as it corrupts App Store rating integrity (guideline 2.3.9 / 5.6.4). The paywall footnote promises free Premium in exchange for a 5-star review, which is a textbook rejection trigger even though the metadata description is clean. Remove the incentive copy and, if you want ratings, use the system SKStoreReviewController prompt with no reward attached.
